have hprime : p.Prime → True := fun _ ↦ trivial
  by_cases hp0 : p = 0
  · simp_all [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum]
  by_cases hp1 : p = 1
  · simp_all [Factorization.balance, Factorization.sum]
  have hp_pos : 0 < p := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hp0
  have hp_ge2 : p ≥ 2 := by omega
  have h_log_pos : Real.log P.n ≥ 0 := Real.log_nonneg (by exact_mod_cast (Nat.succ_le_iff.mpr (Nat.zero_lt_succ _)))
  have h_val_bound : ∀ m ∈ P.initial.a, m.factorization p ≤ Real.log P.n / Real.log p := by
    intro m hm
    have hm_pos : 0 < m := P.initial.hpos m hm
    have hm_le : m ≤ P.n := P.initial.ha m hm
    have h_pow : p ^ (m.factorization p) ≤ m := Nat.pow_factorization_le hm_pos.ne'
    have h_log : (m.factorization p : ℝ) * Real.log p ≤ Real.log m := by
      apply Real.log_le_log <;> norm_cast <;> nlinarith [pow_pos hp_pos (m.factorization p)]
    have h_log_m : Real.log m ≤ Real.log P.n := Real.log_le_log (by exact_mod_cast hm_pos) (by exact_mod_cast hm_le)
    calc (m.factorization p : ℝ) * Real.log p ≤ Real.log m := h_log
      _ ≤ Real.log P.n := h_log_m
    exact (le_div_iff (Real.log_pos.mpr (by exact_mod_cast hp_ge2))).mpr this
  have h_sum_bound : (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum ≤ P.initial.a.card * (Real.log P.n / Real.log p) := by
    calc (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum
      _ ≤ ∑ x in P.initial.a.toFinset, (Real.log P.n / Real.log p) := Finset.sum_le_sum fun x hx ↦ by
        exact_mod_cast h_val_bound x (Multiset.mem_toFinset.mp hx)
      _ = P.initial.a.card * (Real.log P.n / Real.log p) := by simp [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
  have h_fact_bound : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) ≥ 0 := by exact_mod_cast Nat.zero_le _
  calc P.initial.balance p
    _ = (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum - (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℤ) := rfl
    _ ≤ (P.initial.a.map (·.factorization p)).sum := by omega
    _ ≤ P.initial.a.card * (Real.log P.n / Real.log p) := h_sum_bound
    _ ≤ P.n * (Real.log P.n / Real.log p) := by gcongr; exact initial.card P
    _ ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n := by
      have h_p_ge2 : (p : ℝ) ≥ 2 := by exact_mod_cast hp_ge2
      have h_log_p_ge_log2 : Real.log p ≥ Real.log 2 := Real.log_le_log (by linarith) h_p_ge2
      have h_log2_pos : Real.log 2 > 0 := Real.log_pos.mpr (by norm_num)
      calc P.n * (Real.log P.n / Real.log p)
        _ ≤ P.n * (Real.log P.n / Real.log 2) := by gcongr
        _ ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n := by
          have h_n_le_M_mul_L : P.n ≤ P.M * P.L := by
            nlinarith [P.hL, Nat.mul_le_mul_right P.L (Nat.succ_le_of_lt P.hL_pos)]
          have h_L_le_sqrt_n : (P.L : ℝ) ≤ Real.sqrt P.n := by
            rw [le_sqrt (by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le _))]
            exact_mod_cast by nlinarith [P.hL]
          have h_sqrt_n_le_n : Real.sqrt P.n ≤ P.n := Real.sqrt_le_iff.mpr ⟨by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le _), by nlinarith⟩
          calc P.n * (Real.log P.n / Real.log 2)
            _ ≤ P.M * P.L * (Real.log P.n / Real.log 2) := by gcongr
            _ ≤ P.M * Real.sqrt P.n * (Real.log P.n / Real.log 2) := by gcongr
            _ ≤ P.M * P.n * (Real.log P.n / Real.log 2) := by gcongr
            _ ≤ P.M * Real.log P.n := by
              have h_log_n_ge_log2 : Real.log P.n ≥ Real.log 2 := by
                apply Real.log_le_log <;> norm_cast <;> nlinarith [P.hL, P.hL_pos]
